## Persona: Agenda Steward

<!-- id: "agenda_steward", type: "persona" -->

Use [persona](./personas/agenda_steward.toml) when scheduling.

```toml
name = "Agenda Steward"
```

## Template: Missing Draft

<!-- id: "missing_template", type: "template" -->

Use [[templates/not_found.j2]] for rendering.

```jinja2
Task: {{ task }}
```
